arts.ttl: Man City Champions League draw with glamour play-off tie, Arsenal waiting and Liverpool boost
arts.sum: Manchester City's route through the Champions League is clearer ahead of Friday's draw

arts.ttl: 'I wish' - Pep Guardiola sends message to Real Madrid and Bayern Munich
arts.sum: Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola spoke about the Champions League play-off after drawing a European heavyweight

arts.ttl: Man City's forgotten man could make return at Arsenal after huge Pep Guardiola backing
arts.sum: Oscar Bobb is reportedly closing in on a return to action and is attempting to show Manchester City boss Pep Guardiola he is ready for his comeback against Arsenal at the Emirates this weekend

arts.ttl: Champions League draw: Who could Liverpool Arsenal, Manchester City, Aston Villa face in the round of 16?
arts.sum: Premier League sides now know who they can face in the next round of the Champions League following the conclusion of the league phase of the competition on Wednesday.

arts.ttl: 'That's the moment!' Kovacic's solo effort sparks Man City comeback
arts.sum: Mateo Kovacic's solo run and strike pulls Manchester City back level with Brugge at 1-1 on matchday eight of the Champions League group phase at the Etihad Stadium.

arts.ttl: Rio Ferdinand explains why Man City's nightmare Champions League draw is a GOOD thing - as they prepare to face Real Madrid or Bayern Munich
arts.sum: Madrid knocked them out of Europe last season, but City trounced both Los Blancos and Bayern on their way to the title in 2022-23.

arts.ttl: How Stones' half-time positional change won the game for Man City against Brugge
arts.sum: Joe Hart analyses how Pep Guardiola's decision to move John Stones into a "more reserved" position at half-time helped the Premier League champions qualify for the Champions League play-offs.

arts.ttl: Man City avoid Champions League combustion as Real or Bayern await
arts.sum: Manchester City's Champions League hopes almost went up in smoke against Club Brugge - but a big improvement is needed to make the last 16, says BBC Sport chief football writer Phil McNulty.

arts.ttl: Former Manchester City defender labels Pep Guardiola's side as a 'cup team' after the Citizens' victory against Club Brugge
arts.sum: A former Manchester CIty defender has labelled Pep Guardiola 's side as a 'cup team' after they defeated Club Brugge to avoid elimination from the Champions League.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola: Savinho’s spark changed game as Manchester City reach play-offs
